General.Name: DeTai New Energy Group Ltd
General.Description: DeTai New Energy Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the hotel hospitality business in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and Japan. It operates through four segments: Hotel Hospitality Business; Money Lending Services; Liquor and Wine; and Investments in Listed Securities. The company operates One Niseko Resort Towers, a hotel located in the Niseko, Hokkaido. It is also involved in the provision of money lending services; trading and distribution of liquor and wine; and investment in listed securities. The company was formerly known as Guocang Group Limited and changed its name to DeTai New Energy Group Limited in December 2015. DeTai New Energy Group Limited is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Unit D2, 8/F, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
